title: lithocarpus cheliensis
intro: Lithocarpus cheliensis, also known as the Chinese bur oak or Li Li, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus cheliensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Lithocarpus cheliensis is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea for its medicinal properties.
